# Hanzi Writer Data Notice

This project includes a small local subset of character stroke data derived from
`hanzi-writer-data` for MVP stroke-order animation.

- Source package: `hanzi-writer-data@2.0.1`
- Upstream project: <https://github.com/chanind/hanzi-writer-data>
- Data origin: Make Me A Hanzi / Arphic Technology font data
- Data license: Arphic Public License, as noted by Hanzi Writer Data

The subset is intentionally limited to common MVP characters so the app can show
offline stroke-order animation without bundling the full data package.
